mpeg_o.feature_flags
====================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.feature_flags

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``FeatureFlags`` — the registry of format feature strings used by a file.

   The actual on-disk read/write lives in :mod:`mpeg_o._hdf5_io`; this module
   provides a thin value object and the canonical list of reserved feature
   names documented in ``docs/feature-flags.md``.



Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.feature_flags.BASE_V1
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.COMPOUND_IDENTIFICATIONS
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.COMPOUND_QUANTIFICATIONS
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.COMPOUND_PROVENANCE
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_COMPOUND_HEADERS
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_NATIVE_2D_NMR
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_NATIVE_MSIMAGE_CUBE
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_DATASET_ENCRYPTION
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_DIGITAL_SIGNATURES
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_CANONICAL_SIGNATURES
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.COMPOUND_PER_RUN_PROVENANCE
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_KEY_ROTATION
   mpeg_o.feature_flags.OPT_ANONYMIZED


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.feature_flags.FeatureFlags

   :value: 'opt_anonymized'


.. py:class:: FeatureFlags

   Immutable set of format feature strings with a version label.


   .. py:attribute:: version
      :type:  str
      :value: '1.1'



   .. py:attribute:: features
      :type:  tuple[str, Ellipsis]
      :value: ()



   .. py:method:: from_iterable(version: str, features: Iterable[str]) -> FeatureFlags
      :classmethod:



   .. py:method:: has(name: str) -> bool


   .. py:method:: required() -> tuple[str, Ellipsis]

      Features whose absence should cause a reader to refuse the file.
